# Functional requirements

Every requirement carries a `Source` so its provenance is auditable
(safeguard 1). MVP requirements are traced in
`../validation/traceability-matrix.md`.

| ID | Requirement | Scope | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| FR-001 | Create a short link from a submitted long URL. | MVP | Intake brief, line 3 |
| FR-002 | Redirect a short link to its target URL. | MVP | Intake brief, line 4 |
| FR-003 | Count and display click totals per link. | MVP | OQ-001 (resolved) |
